title: Chief Strategy Officer
summary: The Chief Strategy Officer helps Neuroartan choose the right markets, the right timing, and the right path for long-term growth.
biography: This executive seat is open. Neuroartan has defined the role before appointing a public holder so the standard is clear from the beginning.
The role connects product direction, market logic, research movement, and company positioning into one clear strategic path.
This profile remains role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Help Neuroartan move in the right direction at the right time, with strategy that keeps product, research, software, governance, and market position aligned.
